data.content: Approved in implementation_review. Reviewed commit ddbde9dda1cbc2bf56bb117974b56d867bb8d2c2 on branch foolery-44f1. Change adds scrollbar-gutter: stable to src/app/globals.css to reserve scrollbar width and keep the shared top navigation row anchored across ReTakes and Diagnostics transitions, plus a regression assertion in src/lib/__tests__/beats-page-layout.test.ts. Verified against acceptance criteria and found no invariant or regression issues. Sanity gates passed in /Users/cartine/foolery/.knots/_worktree/foolery-44f1: bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build.
